shortCompanyReason: Growing fostering agency building futures for children and families
shortRoleReason: Lead business and administrative functions to keep the agency running effectively
companySummary: Evergreen Foster Care is a forward-thinking fostering agency dedicated to positively impacting the lives of children and families.
roleSummary: The Business Manager oversees business and administrative functions across HR, finance, IT, and compliance while supporting senior leadership and social workers.
headlineAttraction: Make a real impact in a purpose-led fostering agency
rolePurpose: To manage business and administrative operations ensuring the fostering agency runs efficiently and compliantly.
probablePriorities: Support senior leadership and social workers
advertSummary: Permanent full-time Business Manager role at Evergreen Foster Care in Stoke-on-Trent, responsible for business, administrative, and compliance functions to support a growing fostering agency.
coreResponsibilities: Lead business and administrative functions across HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance
Support fostering panel processes including minute-taking and coordination
Manage HR processes, safer recruitment, and employee records
Process payroll and foster carer payments
Oversee office operations, meetings, and training coordination
Act as a key point of contact for stakeholders, carers, and external partners
Support social workers with essential administrative tasks
essentialRequirements: Proven experience in a business or senior administrative role
Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams)
Experience with payroll systems such as SAGE
Excellent organisational skills and attention to detail
Confident communicator with professional and empathetic approach
Proactive, can-do attitude with ability to work independently and in a team
impliedStrategicGoals: Support growth and quality of foster care services

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I am excited by the opportunity to bring my operational leadership and business management experience to a purpose-led fostering agency where my work can make a real impact. With a background in healthcare, manufacturing, and large-scale leisure operations, I thrive in environments that require structure, compliance, and results-focused delivery.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Evergreen Foster Care’s mission to build futures for children and families resonates deeply with me. Being part of a growing, forward-thinking fostering agency where my contribution supports meaningful change is incredibly motivating.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This Business Manager role aligns perfectly with my experience leading operational functions across HR, finance, compliance, and reporting. I enjoy bringing structure and measurable results to fast-moving environments and supporting senior leaders to keep the business running smoothly.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: NHS Primary Care Operations and Transformation
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Demonstrates my ability to manage operational performance, financial control, and compliance in a regulated service environment.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Improved patient experience and delivered a £149.9k profit uplift in NHS operations.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Shows my ability to manage finance, reporting, and operational processes during a growth phase.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Led operations improvements contributing to a 10% gross profit margin increase.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Alton Towers Live Operations and Improvement
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Demonstrates leadership of diverse teams and administrative coordination in a high-pressure environment.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Coordinated live operations across 300+ staff during major attraction launches.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring proven experience in managing business and administrative functions across HR, finance, and compliance in complex, regulated environments. My background shows I can deliver operational efficiency, financial control, and stakeholder support, all of which are essential to this role.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: In this role, I would ensure Evergreen Foster Care runs efficiently, supporting leadership, social workers, and carers alike. I would deliver accurate payroll, maintain compliance, and streamline operational processes to enable the agency to focus on its core mission of supporting children and families.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in supportive, purpose-driven environments where proactive management and attention to detail make a real difference.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would welcome the chance to contribute my operational expertise to Evergreen Foster Care and help the agency continue to grow and deliver meaningful outcomes.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited

examples.title: NHS Primary Care Operations and Transformation
Alton Towers Live Operations and Improvement
